content:
Someone gets their daily medication via automated drug dispensers.

A package arrives. They don’t open it. They don’t know who sent it. They review the front door security camera footage and a young kid walks up to the front door and puts the package down.

They send the kids to school in their driverless car and live out the day at their work.

(Every character should interact with the object that will kill them at the end of the film).

When everyone gets home the security system locks them in. They are still unaware of the situation.

The gift rings and everyone’s phone gets synced to the server.

Whoever is torturing them locks the family in the house.

If the wife takes a bath in the morning, the daughter is killed by the bath at night.

The mother is killed in the kitchen.

The husband is killed by medications, he dies vomitting.

The son is killed by the driverless car.
